title: Property Consultant - ATS Infrastructure - Immediate Joiners Preferred

jsonLd.title: Property Consultant - ATS Infrastructure - Immediate Joiners Preferred
jsonLd.description:
ATS Infrastructure has an exciting opening for a Property Consultant at our Ranchi office. Join a company that values innovation, collaboration, and continuous learning.

About ATS Infrastructure:
ATS Infrastructure is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Source and close property deals with prospective buyers and investors
• Manage relationships with existing customers post-purchase
• Prepare presentations and proposals for institutional clients
• Conduct site visits and property presentations for clients
• Coordinate with legal teams for documentation and title verification
• Negotiate pricing, terms, and conditions on behalf of clients
• Conduct market research and provide competitive analysis

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Arch / M.Arch from recognized institution
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in CRM Software
• Proficiency in Negotiation Skills
• Proficiency in Due Diligence
• Proficiency in Sales Techniques
• Proficiency in Market Research
• Proficiency in Financial Modeling
• Proficiency in Contract Management
• Proficiency in GIS Tools

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Ranchi, Jharkhand, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with ATS Infrastructure!
